## Checklist

- [ ] `PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m pytest -q` is green
- [ ] `python -c "import trainall"` stays torch-free (no top-level heavy imports)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] New training method? added a doc under `docs/methods/`
- [ ] Docstrings explain the idea and cite the paper where relevant
